query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blockchain_transactions (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  transaction_hash VARCHAR(66) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  parcel_id INTEGER,
  transaction_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  from_address VARCHAR(42),
  to_address VARCHAR(42),
  contract_address VARCHAR(42),
  block_number BIGINT,
  gas_used BIGINT,
  gas_price BIGINT,
  value DECIMAL(20, 8),
  status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  metadata JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  confirmed_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_blockchain_tx_hash ON blockchain_transactions(transaction_hash);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_blockchain_parcel ON blockchain_transactions(parcel_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_blockchain_status ON blockchain_transactions(status);
